data.title: Analysts predict Bitcoin market hit bottom, FTX on par, for better days ahead. Optimism grows.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The total number of unemployed individuals now stands at 6.8 million, reflecting a decrease of 500,000. Additionally, the report indicated that the economy added 500,000 new jobs in various sectors, further contributing to the decline in unemployment. This positive trend has been attributed to the government's stimulus efforts and the gradual reopening of businesses following pandemic-related closures. The report also highlighted that the construction and healthcare industries saw the most significant job growth, while hospitality and leisure sectors are still struggling to recover. Experts are optimistic about the future trajectory of the job market as more sectors continue to rebound.

data.title: Costamare Inc. releases 2025 annual report (Form 20-F) accessible on website. Filed with SEC, available on www.costamare.com. Character Count: 117
data.description: Today, Costamare Inc. disclosed that its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, has been submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The report is now available for viewing on the Company's official website, www.costamare.com, specifically in the "Annual Reports" subsection of the "Investors" category. Costamare Inc. operates under the stock symbol NYSE: CMRE.

data.title: LMU expands with Orange Park campus opening on March 23, 2026 in Florida, milestone in health sciences education.
data.description: Marking a significant milestone in its expansion efforts, Lincoln Memorial University (LMU) is preparing to hold a grand opening and ribbon-cutting ceremony on March 23, 2026, at its new health sciences campus in Orange Park, Florida. This event will signify the university's commitment to growth and development in the area.

data.title: Norman L. Traeger retires from M/I Homes Board of Directors in May 2026.(MHO)
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio on March 4, 2026, M/I Homes, Inc. (NYSE: MHO) revealed that Norman L. Traeger, an independent Board member, will retire from the Company's Board in May. Traeger conveyed his decision to retire upon the conclusion of his term.

data.title: Post Holdings priced senior notes offering at 100.75% of principal amount for 6.250% senior notes due 2034.
data.description: Today in St. Louis, Post Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: POST) disclosed the pricing details of its senior notes offering. The company is offering 6.250% senior notes due 2034, known as the "Notes," at 100.75% of the principal amount.

data.title: Carrier Global Corporation's CEO to speak at 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on March 18, 2026 at 2:15 p.m. ET live on ir.carrier.com.
data.description: The Chairman & CEO of Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), David Gitlin, is set to address the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida on March 18, 2026, at 2:15 p.m. ET. This event will be streamed live on ir.carrier.com for those interested in tuning in.

data.title: Hillphoenix launches Next Generation Flex Mini for food retail and industrial markets, expanding CO2 portfolio.
data.description: Downers Grove, Illinois - On March 4, 2026, Hillphoenix, a subsidiary of Dover Food Retail and Dover (NYSE: DOV), unveiled the Next Generation Flex Mini refrigeration system. This innovative product is designed for sustainability, offering high performance using CO₂ technology.

data.title: Veris Residential (NYSE: VRE) declares cash dividend for first quarter 2026. Board of Directors announces the decision.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, Veris Residential, Inc. (NYSE: VRE) based in Jersey City, New Jersey, disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a cash dividend for its common shareholders. Veris Residential, a Class A multifamily REIT centered in the Northeast, aims to deliver future-oriented services. This move signifies the company's commitment to enhancing shareholder value and remained driven towards its strategic goals.

data.title: Farmer Mac to hold Investor Day on March 18, 2026. Secondary market provider increasing financing for agriculture & rural infrastructure.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Washington, the Federal Agricultural Mortgage Corporation, also known as Farmer Mac and listed on NYSE under AGM and AGM.A, serves as the country's secondary market entity. This corporation plays a crucial role in enhancing financing accessibility and providing essential liquidity for American agriculture and rural infrastructure.

data.title: Webull's 2025 financial results: $571M in revenue, $8.6B in net deposits (46% and 91% increase, respectively).
data.description: In its inaugural year as a publicly traded company, the organization achieved outstanding results, with a monumental $571 million in revenue and a staggering $8.6 billion in net deposits. This signifies a remarkable 46% growth in revenue and an impressive 91% surge in net deposits. Moving forward, Webull is dedicated to broadening its product range on a global scale, all the while maintaining its commitment to being the premier platform for its clientele.
